briefdescription.para: Wakeup the RRAM from low power mode.
Commit the data stored in internal write-buffer to RRAM.
RRAMC tasks.
The RRAM is woken up from low power mode.
RRAMC is ready.
Ready to accept a new write operation.
RRAM access error.
RRAMC events.
Interrupt on WOKENUP event.
Interrupt on READY event.
Interrupt on READYNEXT event.
Interrupt on ACCESSERROR event.
All RRAMC interrupts.
RRAMC interrupts.
The RRAM goes into power down mode.

detaileddescription.para: The RRAM automatically goes into standby mode while the RRAM is not being accessed.

briefdescription.para: The RRAM goes into NAP mode.
The RRAM is powered off.
RRAMC low power modes.
Read access.
Write access.
Software execute.
Secure-only access.
RRAMC region permissions mask.

simplesect.para: When bit is set, the selected action is allowed.

briefdescription.para: Function for activating the specified RRAMC task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task to be activated.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the address of the specified RRAMC task register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
RRAMC task.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified task register.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the specified RRAMC event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the peripheral register structure.
Event to clear.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the state of the RRAMC event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to be checked.
The event has been generated.
The event has not been generated.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the address of the specified RRAMC event register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the peripheral register structure.
Requested event.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified event register.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the peripheral register structure.
Mask of interrupts to be enabled. Use nrf_rramc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the peripheral register structure.
Mask of interrupts to be disabled. Use nrf_rramc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the specified interrupts are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be checked. Use nrf_rramc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

simplesect.para: Mask of enabled interrupts.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the state of pending interrupts.

simplesect.para: States of pending interrupt are saved as a bitmask. One set at particular position means that interrupt for event is pending.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Bitmask with information about pending interrupts. Use nrf_rramc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the subscribe configuration for a wakeup RRAMC task.

simplesect.para: Not every task has its corresponding subscribe register. Refer to the Product Specification for more information.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to set the configuration.
Channel through which to subscribe events.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the subscribe configuration for a wakeup RRAMC task.

simplesect.para: Not every task has its corresponding subscribe register. Refer to the Product Specification for more information.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to clear the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the subscribe configuration for a given RRAMC task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to read the configuration.

simplesect.para: RRAMC subscribe configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the publish configuration for a wokenup RRAMC event.

simplesect.para: Not every event has its corresponding publish register. Refer to the Product Specification for more information.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to set the configuration.
Channel through which to publish the event.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the publish configuration for a wokenup RRAMC event.

simplesect.para: Not every event has its corresponding publish register. Refer to the Product Specification for more information.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to clear the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the publish configuration for a given RRAMC event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to read the configuration.

simplesect.para: RRAMC publish configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking current RRAMC operation status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Current operation is completed, and RRAMC is ready.
RRAMC is busy.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking whether RRAMC is ready to accept a new write operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
RRAMC is ready to accept a new write operation.
RRAMC cannot accept any write operation now.

briefdescription.para: Fuction for checking the address of the first access error.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Access error address.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking whether the internal write-buffer has been committed to RRAM and is now empty.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The internal write-buffer is empty and has no content that needs to be commited.
The internal write-buffer has data that needs to be committed.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the RRAMC peripheral configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with RRAMC configuration data.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the RRAMC peripheral configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure with configuration to be set.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting preload timeout value for waiting for a next write.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with information about preload timeout value.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting preload timeout value for waiting for a next write.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure filled with information about$ preload timeout value.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the RRAMC power configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with information about power configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the RRAMC power configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure filled with information about power configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the erasing operation of the whole RRAM main block has been started.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Erase of chip started.
No operation.

briefdescription.para: Function for erasing whole RRAM main block, that includes the SICR and the UICR.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the configuration of the specified RRAMC region.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Region number.
Pointer to the configuration structure.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the configuration of the specified RRAMC region.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Region number.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with RRAMC region settings.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the raw configuration of the specified RRAMC region.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Region number.

simplesect.para: Raw configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for writing a byte to RRAM memory.

simplesect.para: If write buffer is enabled, new data might not be immediately committed to the target memory.
Before calling this function, the caller must ensure that write mode is enabled using nrf_rramc_config_set.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the byte to write.
Value to write.

briefdescription.para: Function for writing a halfword to RRAM memory.

simplesect.para: If write buffer is enabled, new data might not be immediately committed to the target memory.
Before calling this function, the caller must ensure that write mode is enabled using nrf_rramc_config_set.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the halfword to write.
Value to write.

briefdescription.para: Function for writing a word to RRAM memory.

simplesect.para: If write buffer is enabled, new data might not be immediately committed to the target memory.
Before calling this function, the caller must ensure that write mode is enabled using nrf_rramc_config_set.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the word to write.
Value to write.

briefdescription.para: Function for writing a given number of bytes from a specified buffer into RRAM memory.

simplesect.para: If write buffer is enabled, new data might not be immediately committed to the target memory.
Before calling this function, the caller must ensure that write mode is enabled using nrf_rramc_config_set.

parameterdescription.para: Destination address in RRAM.
Pointer to the buffer from where data will be copied.
Number of bytes to write.

briefdescription.para: Function for reading a byte from the RRAM memory.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the byte to read.

simplesect.para: Value read from RRAM memory.

briefdescription.para: Function for reading a halfword from the RRAM memory.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the halfword to read.

simplesect.para: Value read from RRAM memory.

briefdescription.para: Function for reading a word from the RRAM memory.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the word to read.

simplesect.para: Value read from RRAM memory.

briefdescription.para: Function for reading a given number of bytes from RRAM memory into a specified buffer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the buffer to store the data.
Address of the first byte to read.
Number of bytes to read.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting RRAMC low power mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
RRAMC low power mode.

briefdescription.para: Symbol indicating whether RRAM controller has secure-only access configuration.
Symbol indicating whether RRAM controller has nap mode.
Symbol indicating whether RRAM controller has power down mode.
Maximum size of a write-buffer in number of 128-bit words.
Maximum preload timeout value for waiting for a next write.
RRAMC region permissions bitmask.
Hardware access layer for managing the the Resistive Random Access Memory Controller (RRAMC) peripheral.
